name: Crossroads Gold Corp.
description: Crossroads Gold Corp. is a junior gold explorer focused on historical high-grade gold projects in Victoria, Australia, including the Steiglitz project in the Bendigo Zone and the Pheasant Creek project covering 232 km². The company commenced trading on the TSXV in March 2026 following a go-public financing of over C$5.2 million, with Steiglitz historically producing approximately 250,800 ounces of gold at 38 g/t.
